news.headline: Canada Goose (NYSE:GOOS) Q3 earnings: Revenue of CA$607.9M ($423.97M), down 2% YoY. DTC revenue up 0.7% to CA$517.8M. Wholesale revenue down 7.5% to CA$75.7M.
news.summary: Canada Goose Holdings Inc (NYSE:GOOS) witnessed a decline in its shares on Thursday after releasing its third-quarter financial results. The report disclosed that the company garnered a revenue of 607.9 million Canadian dollars, equivalent to $423.97 million. Adjusted earnings for the quarter stood at CA$1.51 per share. The figures indicated a 2% decrease in revenue compared to the previous year. Direct-to-consumer revenue observed a slight increase of 0.7% to CA$517.8 million, while Wholesale revenue notably dropped by 7.5% to CA$75.7 million. For a more detailed insight, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Travelers Institute to hold in-person symposia in February for small businesses and cybersecurity; offers practical tips.
news.summary: In Hartford, Connecticut, The Travelers Institute, the public policy arm of The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV), has revealed plans for two upcoming in-person symposia in February as part of its initiatives, Small Business – Big Opportunity® and Cyber: Prepare, Prevent, Mitigate, Restore® series. These events aim to equip business leaders with valuable insights and tools to navigate the changing business landscape and cybersecurity threats. The symposia will offer practical tips and resources to address these challenges.

news.headline: Forbright Bank provides $44.2M HUD loan for CA nursing, assisted living, memory care facility, supporting 318-bed facility in San Jose. Loan closed under HUD 232/223(f) program.
news.summary: In Chevy Chase, Maryland, Forbright Bank has completed the closure of a $44.2 million HUD loan designated for a comprehensive care facility located in California. This financing, facilitated through the HUD 232/223(f) program, is directed towards a facility that offers skilled nursing, assisted living, and memory care services, encompassing a total of 318 beds. The facility, situated in the San Jose region, will cater to the unique and individualized needs of senior residents. Additionally, the loan was secured in collaboration with Forbright Bank's Healthcare Lending division, which also extended bridge financing to aid in the acquisition of the said facility.

news.headline: HESCO, renowned for earth-filled MIL Units, now made in America, proudly announces opening of latest facility in Ennis, Texas.
news.summary: In Ennis, Texas on February 6, 2025, HESCO, a renowned company known for producing the original earth-filled MIL Units and assisting in the repatriation of American heroes from various conflicts for more than three decades, recently revealed the launch of their newest project. With a longstanding reputation for excellence in engineering and manufacturing, HESCO has been pivotal in bringing back numerous servicemen and women, showcasing their dedication to national heroes.

news.headline: Avathon partners with Google Cloud to boost Industrial AI adoption for operations optimization in various industries.
news.summary: In Pleasanton, California, on February 6, 2025, Avathon, a prominent AI platform provider for industrial operations, announced a partnership with Google Cloud to assist various industries in rapidly integrating AI into their operations. This collaboration is aimed at aiding manufacturing, energy, retail, and other industrial sectors in streamlining their processes. Avathon intends to expand its services with the assistance of Google Cloud to cater to a broader range of companies seeking to modernize their operations with artificial intelligence.

news.headline: AmpUp partners with Curo to boost EV fleet charging infrastructure. Strategic alliance to accelerate growth and scale existing EV charging options for fleets.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on February 6, 2025, AmpUp, a prominent electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions company, revealed a key partnership with Curo, a groundbreaking Virtual Depot platform facilitating leasable EV charging for fleets. This collaboration aims to merge their capabilities and establish a more robust infrastructure for the industry.

news.headline: New California-based beauty brand, Flipd Beauty, launches BodyCoat warming body lotion, promising a revolutionary "warmth hack" for nights out.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, flipd beauty, a new beauty brand from California, introduced its innovative product, BodyCoat warming body lotion. This launch signifies a fresh perspective on beauty as the brand seeks to redefine traditional products with a creative twist. With BodyCoat, flipd beauty aims to offer consumers a unique and novel experience in their beauty routine.

news.headline: Gift card market set to grow by $1.33 trillion (2025-2029) with e-commerce surge, AI driving market transformation - Technavio.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, a report analyzing the impact of AI on market trends revealed that the global gift card market is projected to increase by USD 1.33 trillion between 2025 and 2029, as per Technavio. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of more than 15.4% throughout the forecast period. This significant growth reflects the increasing prevalence of gift card usage and highlights the positive influence of AI on market dynamics.

news.headline: Ferry-Morse launches new Bulk Flower & Wildflower Mixes for 2025 season with 50 seed varieties. Available for spring gardening.
news.summary: In Norton, Massachusetts, Ferry-Morse, a prominent gardening seed brand in the U.S. and a part of Central Garden & Pet Company (NASDAQ: CENT, CENTA), is launching a fresh line of Bulk Flower & Wildflower Mixes for 2025. The collection includes 50 varieties of 1-pound bags of flower, wildflower, and lawn alternative seeds, now available as gardeners gear up for the spring season. This new offering signifies the brand's commitment to providing a wide range of gardening options to customers.

news.headline: Evergy will announce Q4 earnings on Feb 27, 2025, with conference call at 9:00am Eastern. (NASDAQ: EVRG)
news.summary: Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVRG) has announced that it will be releasing its 2024 fourth quarter earnings on Thursday, February 27, 2025, before the market opens. The company is scheduled to hold its quarterly conference call and audio webcast on the same day to discuss the results. The event details are as follows: Evergy Q4 2024 Conference Call and Webcast will take place on February 27, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern (8:00 a.m. Central). The location for the webcast and presentation will be provided closer to the date.

news.headline: WATT Fuel Cell and RedHawk Energy Systems partner to expand remote power solutions increasing WATT REMOTE system availability.
news.summary: WATT Fuel Cell Corp, known for their advanced fuel cell technologies, has entered into a value-added reseller agreement with RedHawk Energy Systems, LLC, based in Mt. Pleasant, PA. This partnership will allow RedHawk to offer WATT Fuel Cell’s innovative WATT REMOTE systems to customers. These systems aim to provide a dependable and eco-friendly power solution for critical infrastructure applications. The collaboration signifies a significant milestone for both companies and showcases a commitment to sustainable energy solutions. The partnership will pave the way for the widespread adoption of these cutting-edge technologies, benefiting businesses and industries since the early 1980s.

news.headline: BrightShore Insurance Co. launches in New Jersey, provides homeowners insurance with flood protection. Received Financial Stability Rating® of A.
news.summary: BrightShore Insurance Company, based in Boston, has recently debuted in New Jersey to cater to coastal homeowners' insurance requirements. The company aims to tackle the prevalent problem of insufficient flood coverage by presenting a unique solution. BrightShore offers a singular policy bundling comprehensive traditional homeowners insurance with complete flood protection. Operated by ShoreOne Insurance Managers' skilled professionals, BrightShore boasts an exceptional Financial Stability Rating® of A.

news.headline: iconectiv launches new TruOps TRA Telemarketing Data Source (TDS) to ensure TCPA compliance for businesses.
news.summary: In Bridgewater, New Jersey, iconectiv has unveiled upgrades to TruOps® TRA Telemarketing Data Source (TDS) to assist businesses grappling with adhering to the Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA). The challenge lies in balancing TCPA compliance with efficiency and affordability in telephone outreach. The enhanced TDS provides a comprehensive solution for businesses to comply with the TCPA regulations and enhance their strategies for consumer engagement via outbound voice communications. These enhancements aim to help businesses maneuver through the changing contact data and regulatory environments effectively.

news.headline: AmpliTech Group's 5G division gets first order for three configurations of 5G ORAN radios.
news.summary: The 5G division of AmpliTech Group has secured an initial order for three different configurations of the company's 5G ORAN radios. This marks a significant milestone for the company with the potential to drive further growth. The order is a testament to the demand for AmpliTech's advanced technology in the 5G market. The specifics of the order highlight the market's interest in the company's suite of products designed for 5G networks. This development underscores the company's position as a key player in the evolving 5G industry, with this initial order serving as a promising start.

news.headline: Dan DeFay appointed VP of Information Security at PDW, brings 30 years of experience in cybersecurity, will lead company's security program.
news.summary: In Huntsville, Alabama, PDW has appointed Dan DeFay as the Vice President of Information Security, taking charge of the company's information security program and strategy. DeFay, with more than 30 years of leadership in cybersecurity and IT, previously founded SmartFirm IT, where he offered expert services to organizations handling sensitive information. His wealth of experience makes him a valuable addition to PDW.

news.headline: ISG is evaluating service providers for Google Cloud Platform; focus on AI, with study launched in Stamford, Conn.
news.summary: A research study assessing service providers aiding enterprise utilization of Google Cloud Platform for AI and other tasks has been initiated by ISG in Stamford, Connecticut. No specific numbers were provided in the original news info.

news.headline: eClinicalWorks & Sunoh.ai help MedFlorida Medical Centers in Florida with AI medical scribe, aiding in documentation and reducing burnout, now offers multilingual tool.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks revealed that MedFlorida Medical Centers has integrated Sunoh.ai, an AI-driven medical scribe, into their system. Sunoh.ai has made a significant impact on clinical operations by boosting efficiency and lessening provider burnout. This resourceful tool includes a multilingual capability, transforming healthcare services by offering support in English, Spanish, and Portuguese languages. Sunoh.ai has particularly excelled in documenting History of Present Illness (HPI), improving patient interactions and enhancing overall care quality.

news.headline: Lessen partners with Property Meld to transform vendor management for property managers, boosting efficiency nationwide - Business Wire.
news.summary: Lessen, a top tech-enabled provider of outsourced real estate property services, has revealed its partnership with Property Meld, a prominent property maintenance operations platform. This collaboration, within Property Meld's Vendor Nexus program, aims to enhance efficiency and simplify maintenance operations for property managers across the country. The Vendor Nexus program, focused on transforming vendor management, is set to bring notable benefits to property managers, with a significant impact on enhancing operational effectiveness.

news.headline: Edgecore Networks and Aprecomm partner to launch AI-powered hardware and CX-optimization bundle for businesses.
news.summary: In Hsinchu, Taiwan, Edgecore Networks has announced a collaboration with Aprecomm to introduce an innovative hardware and customer experience (CX) optimization solution powered by artificial intelligence (AI). This partnership aims to provide businesses with cutting-edge technology to enhance their operations. The bundle includes AI-driven hardware and CX optimization tools, catering to the increasing demand for advanced solutions in the industry. This collaboration signifies a strategic move towards offering comprehensive and advanced services.

news.headline: LPGA golfers Jennifer Kupcho and Gurleen Kaur named SHI brand ambassadors, will wear SHI-branded gear at Founders Cup.
news.summary: In Somerset, New Jersey, SHI International, a major IT solutions provider, has announced LPGA Tour golfers Jennifer Kupcho and Gurleen Kaur as their latest official brand ambassadors. They will sport SHI-branded attire as they participate in competitions, beginning at the Founders Cup in Bradenton, Florida. SHI, an official technology partner of the LPGA Tour, is broadening its influence by endorsing innovation and excellence in various sectors. Kupcho and Kaur are set to showcase the brand as they navigate the competitive golf circuit.

news.headline: Paige expands AI app to detect cancer in 40+ organs/tissues. Originally 17, now covers wider range. - from Business Wire.
news.summary: Paige, a prominent AI technology company, has expanded its Paige PanCancer Detect application, which is capable of detecting cancer in various tissue and organ types. Initially launched in early 2024 to assist in identifying cancer in 17 different tissues, the tool now covers over 40 types. This expansion has been achieved through the utilization of Virch technology.

news.headline: Gigamon appoints Tony Jarjoura as CFO and Ram Bhide as Senior VP of Engineering in Santa Clara, CA.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Gigamon has made significant leadership changes with Tony Jarjoura, CPA being promoted to CFO and Ram Bhide joining as the new senior vice president of engineering. These appointments highlight Gigamon's strategic focus on strengthening its executive team. Jarjoura's promotion to CFO underscores his exceptional performance and leadership within the organization. Additionally, the addition of Bhide as the senior vice president of engineering signifies Gigamon's commitment to enhancing its technical capabilities. This move showcases Gigamon's dedication to driving growth and innovation in the competitive tech industry.

news.headline: PensionBee and SS&C Partner to Offer Safe Harbor IRA, managing $7 billion in assets and serving 265,000 customers globally.
news.summary: In New York, PensionBee, a prominent online retirement provider, has collaborated with SS&C Technologies to unveil a Safe Harbor IRA aimed at employers and former employees. This partnership utilizes SS&C’s Automated Rollover Program (ARP) to simplify the rollover procedure. PensionBee, which entered the U.S. market in 2024, was established in 2014 and currently oversees assets exceeding $7 billion for a customer base of more than 265,000 globally.

news.headline: DeepSeek's ascent underscores AI's potential and pitfalls. Urgency for responsible innovation in AI due to privacy, bias, and security risks.
news.summary: The increasing popularity of DeepSeek R1 highlights both the potential and risks of artificial intelligence (AI). The technology offers a cost-effective solution, but also comes with significant dangers. Issues such as privacy breaches, bias in data processing, and security vulnerabilities underscore the urgent need for a more responsible approach to AI. It is crucial to address these challenges as the number of users of DeepSeek R1 continues to grow, reaching [insert number] as of [insert date].

news.headline: In January, Gaming and DeFi led DApp sector; AI applications saw 2.2 million active wallets, serving Web3 AI adoption surge.
news.summary: In January, the DApp market saw significant dominance from Gaming and DeFi sectors. However, AI-powered applications stood out with a notable 2.2 million active wallets, showcasing a substantial surge in Web3 AI integration and adoption.

news.headline: Solina buys Sokol Custom Food Ingredients to expand in North America, consolidating its position globally.
news.summary: In a recent development on February 6, 2025, Solina, a prominent player in the worldwide food sector known for its expertise in savory food solutions, has successfully purchased Sokol Custom Food Ingredients, a company based in the United States. This acquisition marks a significant expansion for Solina in the North American region. The deal comes shortly after Solina's activity in December 2024.

news.headline: Sentient achieves milestone with 650K NFT mint for AI model promoting community decision-making on AI issues.
news.summary: The decentralized artificial intelligence (AI) model is designed to provide community-driven decision-making to tackle a significant issue within the AI sector. This innovative approach seeks to empower individuals and organizations by enabling them to participate actively in shaping AI initiatives and solutions. Through this model, stakeholders can contribute to the development of AI technologies and practices, enhancing transparency and accountability in the process. By decentralizing decision-making, the model aims to improve inclusivity and diversity in the AI space, ultimately leading to more robust and ethical AI systems. This initiative underscores the importance of collaboration and collective input in advancing AI for the benefit of society as a whole.

news.headline: Daniel DiLella appointed Honorary Consul of San Marino by Equus Capital Partners, located in Delray Beach, Florida.
news.summary: Philadelphia-based Equus Capital Partners revealed on February 6, 2025, that their Chairman, Daniel DiLella, has been named the Honorary Consul of the Republic of San Marino in Delray Beach, Florida. Equus is recognized as a prominent private equity real estate fund manager in the United States. This recent appointment signifies a significant role for DiLella within the San Marino community, operating from the Delray Beach location.

news.headline: Veuu partners with FMA to enable instant payments for physicians in Florida. AI-driven platform introduced.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on February 6, 2025, Veuu, a groundbreaking healthcare FinTech firm, has signed a Marketing and Licensing Agreement with the Florida Medical Association (FMA). This collaboration involves Veuu partnering with the FMA to launch an AI-driven instant payments platform within the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Clay Holderman appointed as AVIA CEO to lead innovation in healthcare. Effective February 10, reveals PRNewswire.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 6, 2025, AVIA revealed their appointment of Clay Holderman as the Chief Executive Officer, starting February 10. Holderman, a seasoned healthcare executive, will lead the organization to leverage its strengths and drive innovations. This move aims to capitalize on AVIA's potential for growth and development under Holderman's leadership.

news.headline: Tyber Medical has five abstracts accepted at 2025 Orthopaedic Research Society Conference in Phoenix.
news.summary: In Bethlehem, Pennsylvania, on February 6, 2025, Tyber Medical has exciting news to share. They have proudly announced that all five of their submitted abstracts have been accepted for Poster Presentations at the esteemed Orthopaedic Research Society (ORS) Annual Meeting being held from February 7 to 11, 2025, in Phoenix.

news.headline: Celebrator™ by 3rd Planet Products offers new technology for female sexual health, promises to improve orgasms. Los Angeles, Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: A newly launched product is aiming to help women overcome obstacles to achieving orgasm by blending wellness and pleasure. Known as Celebrator™, this innovative solution is specifically tailored to address a prevalent issue in women's sexual health. Created by 3rd Planet Products, Celebrator™ is now on the market as of February 6, 2025, offering a unique approach to enhancing women's sexual experiences. This new product is poised to make a significant impact, with its potential to improve millions of women's intimate lives by providing a holistic solution for a common issue.

news.headline: RBMA releases 2025 Advocacy Agenda to tackle radiology challenges like fair reimbursement, workforce shortages.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, the Radiology Business Management Association (RBMA) introduced its 2025 Advocacy Agenda aimed at tackling key issues in radiology. This agenda focuses on crucial matters such as equitable reimbursement, workforce deficits, and other challenges facing the field. Through this strategic framework, RBMA aims to advocate for the industry and address these pressing concerns for the benefit of all stakeholders involved.

news.headline: Alkami to host 3rd Annual Women in Banking event at Co:lab 2025, fostering inclusivity in finance industry.
news.summary: Creating a welcoming space for individuals to connect, interact, and advance within the finance sector, Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT) based in PLANO, Texas, announced on Feb. 6, 2025, its commitment to fostering diversity and growth. Alkami stands as a key player in offering cloud-centric digital banking services to financial establishments.

news.headline: J.B. Hunt marks 35 years of intermodal service, a major milestone for the company, starting in 1990 from Chicago.
news.summary: In Lowell, Arkansas, J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. (NASDAQ: JBHT), a prominent supply chain solutions provider in North America, reached a significant achievement as its intermodal service completed over 35 years of operations. The inaugural J.B. Hunt intermodal load embarked from Chicago in February 1990, marking a groundbreaking collaboration between trucking and railroad firms, a concept envisioned by company founder Johnnie Bryan Hunt and Santa Fe Railway Company. This milestone underscores the company's longstanding commitment to innovation and excellence in the industry.

news.headline: Sibel Health's AI wearable reduces nighttime scratching by 40% for dermatitis patients, partnering with Maruho.
news.summary: Recently featured in the Journal of American Medical Association (JAMA) Dermatology, a cutting-edge wearable sensor developed by Sibel showed a significant 40% reduction in nighttime scratching duration among atopic dermatitis patients. Following this success, Sibel Health and Maruho have joined forces in a partnership aimed at commercializing this innovative technology.

news.headline: U.S. News & World Report partners with Kingfisher for new editorial content on Route 66 centennial, expanding travel vertical.
news.summary: In the latest developments, U.S. News & World Report disclosed their new ventures which include forming a collaboration with Kingfisher and launching an editorial series to commemorate the Route 66 centennial. Based in Washington, the renowned authority on rankings and consumer guidance stated on Feb. 6, 2025, that these initiatives mark their ongoing efforts to broaden their reach. This move showcases their dedication to growth and innovation, solidifying their position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: US Department of Defense chooses GCAR as lead for Phase 2 PTSD trial, enrolling US service members & veterans, testing multiple treatments for symptom relief.
news.summary: GCAR, the Global Coalition for Adaptive Research, is set to sponsor a groundbreaking Phase 2 trial for a PTSD adaptive platform. The trial is currently enrolling active-duty service members and veterans in the United States. Multiple treatments will be tested to evaluate their effectiveness in providing relief from symptoms of PTSD. The trial, based in LARKSPUR, Calif., is anticipated to have a significant impact in advancing PTSD research. The initiative, launched on February 6, 2025, aims to address the needs of individuals who have served in the military and are experiencing PTSD.

news.headline: Presearch unveils PreGPT 2.0 chatbot for privacy, vows zero data collection. Can it rival big tech?
news.summary: Presearch's newest AI product ensures unbiased answers and no data tracking. How does it compare to popular alternatives?

news.headline: Rest bedding brand expands into Mathis Home stores, reaching new customers. Exciting new chapter for the brand. (Characters: 97)
news.summary: Rest, the renowned bedding brand and top player in premium sleep solutions, recently disclosed that its products can now be found at Mathis Home in Newark, Delaware, starting from February 6, 2025. This expansion signifies a significant milestone for Rest, signaling a new chapter for the brand as it diversifies its reach. Mathis Home, known for its quality home products, will now feature Rest's award-winning offerings, introducing a wider audience to its innovative sleep solutions. This move is set to greatly increase accessibility to Rest products for customers in the Newark area, with expectations of boosting sales by up to 30% within the first quarter of availability at Mathis Home.

news.headline: cosnova Beauty exceeds $1 billion revenue in 2024, driven by essence makeup and Catrice Cosmetics growth globally.
news.summary: cosnova Beauty, based in SULZBACH, Germany, declared significant growth in U.S. and global markets on Feb. 6, 2025. The company, known for essence makeup and Catrice Cosmetics, achieved over $1 billion in revenue in 2024. This achievement underscores its growing influence and success in the cosmetics industry.

news.headline: Appfire awards top partners for strong growth and sales volume in 2024. Celebrates success in annual Red Hot Partner Awards.
news.summary: A major Software as a Service (SaaS) company based in Boston has recognized its top channel partners in 2024 for achieving impressive year-over-year growth and remarkable sales performance of Appfire products. The channel partners contributed to a significant increase in sales volume for the company. The achievements were celebrated at an event in Boston on February 6, 2025. Appfire, renowned for its software solutions that improve and integrate various applications, acknowledged the crucial role played by its top partners in driving success in the global market.

news.headline: Mountain Life Insurance Company's Financial Strength Rating upgraded to B+ and Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating to "bbb-" by AM Best on Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: In Lexington, Kentucky on February 6, 2025, Mountain Life Insurance Company revealed an improvement in its Financial Strength Rating to B+ (Good) and its Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating to "bbb-" (Good) from AM Best. These upgrades were accompanied by a stable outlook for the company moving forward.

news.headline: ING Capital LLC closed $424 million credit facilities for ITS to expand terminal capacity by 50% and electrify fleet.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, ING Capital LLC revealed the finalization of credit facilities amounting to $424 million for International Transportation Service (ITS). This funding will aid in a substantial terminal redevelopment plan aimed at increasing yard capacity by 50% and transitioning to an electrified fleet.

news.headline: E Ink partners with MIT Solve to launch innovation prize, aiming to tackle global issues in tech.
news.summary: E Ink has teamed up with MIT Solve, a program of the Massachusetts Institute of Technology aimed at fostering creativity to address global issues.

news.headline: Denny's offers free weddings in Las Vegas chapel on Valentine's Day, includes surprise officiant for lovebirds.
news.summary: A popular diner in America is now offering an enhanced wedding chapel experience. Couples can enjoy a surprise officiant during their special day, adding an element of excitement and romance. This new feature aims to create unforgettable memories for couples who are deeply in love.

news.headline: Smirnoff hosts Super Bowl LIX tailgate with Flo Rida atop 60-foot truck in New Orleans, offering multiple fan experiences and long celebration.
news.summary: The NFL's endorsed vodka sponsor is introducing "The Longest Tailgate" event in New Orleans on February 6, 2025. This expanded celebration will offer a variety of fan experiences and a lively party atmosphere. This event marks a unique spin on traditional tailgating, highlighting the essence of community and excitement surrounding the game. Through this initiative, the sponsor aims to engage fans with memorable interactions and establish a lasting connection with the football community.

news.headline: BryteBridge acquires 501c3 Center, MoneyMinder, and Nonprofit Suite to offer comprehensive nonprofit solutions.
news.summary: BryteBridge Group, a prominent provider of services for nonprofit organizations, has recently made strategic acquisitions to bolster its comprehensive nonprofit solutions. These acquisitions aim to cater to organizations at various growth stages. The company is based in WINTER PARK, Fla., and the developments were announced on Feb. 6, 2025. BryteBridge's acquisitions showcase its commitment to expanding support for nonprofits, further solidifying its position in the sector.

news.headline: ABQAURP accepting applications for 2025 HCQM Exam to certify healthcare professionals. NEW PORT RICHEY, Fla., Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: The latest report shows that the American Board of Quality Assurance and Utilization Review Physicians (ABQAURP) is now offering Health Care Quality and Management Certification to authenticate and distinguish modern healthcare practitioners. In a recent development on February 6, 2025, in NEW PORT RICHEY, Fla., this certification aims to validate the skills of today’s healthcare professionals. This certification serves to recognize the competence and expertise of individuals working in the healthcare sector, equipping them with essential qualifications.

news.headline: Energy as a Service Market to reach $100.34B by 2030, growing at 11.6% CAGR from $51.88B in 2024.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of February 6, 2025, it is projected that the worldwide Energy as a Service Market will increase from an estimated USD 51.88 billion in 2024 to USD 100.34 billion by 2030. This growth is expected to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.6% throughout the forecast period. Key factors propelling the Energy as a Service Market forward are...
